showing that data near the mean are more frequent in occurence
than data far from the mean

div.div:
Choosing the number of components:
- Plot b/t number of components & cummulative explained variance
- This plot measures how well PCA preserves the content of the data
- Here, we see that the first 10 components contain approximately 75%
of the variance, while you need around 50 components to describe
close to 100% of the variance
